spec_match.rationale: The comparator now shows auto, spaces, and legacy none as three visible columns, with none described as an alias of spaces.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP clicked all language tabs and the ruler toggle, verifying all three prose panels update.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now describes the three-column comparator that the page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: The explicit spaces column makes the none==spaces alias behavior visible instead of hiding it behind an auto/none comparison.

references.rationale: The concept page now embeds the ChromeStatus feature link.

design_system.rationale: The page uses CSS variables and no raw hex literals were found.

summary: Prose Comparator now has three panels for auto, spaces, and legacy none, plus the canonical ChromeStatus link. DevTools MCP verified language tab changes, ruler toggling, panel count, and no console errors.
